nasb.text: But Paul kept insisting that they should not take him along who had deserted them in Pamphylia and had not gone with them to the work.

esv.text: But Paul thought best not to take with them one who had withdrawn from them in Pamphylia and had not gone with them to the work.

cnv.text: 但保羅認為不應帶他去，因為他從前在旁非利亞離開過他們，不跟他們一起去作工。

ccb.text: 但保罗坚持不带他同行，因为他在旁非利亚离开了他们，没有和他们一起做工。

csbs.text: 但是保罗觉得不该带他一起去，因为他曾在潘菲利亚省离开他们，没有陪他们一起去工作。
